microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end product strategy for Azure's **resilience validation platform**, defining requirements and a prioritized roadmap that scaled from a 2-person operation to 45+ annual drills, delivering **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, scoping self-service scheduling features that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned drill execution to a fully scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level drill program — decomposing an ambiguous problem into a concrete technical plan, shipping in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate and surfacing critical hardware defects.

Directed 14 high-visibility cross-org recovery executions, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud **network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, aligning security, engineering, and executive stakeholders.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning and restructured sprint workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and expanding drill capacity by 21% — establishing a new product-development best practice for the team.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-driven code-generation workflows, running user demos and training that activated 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Shaped the product roadmap by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, diagnosing platform pain points and translating operator needs into a prioritized **intent-based YAML generation** feature.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and reducing developer friction on the Lattice-style platform.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across 140+ teams on a unified **automation prioritization framework**, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating **$3M in accelerated revenue**.

Embedded with 20+ service teams to surface 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, then built a **product roadmap** to automate critical execution paths — mirroring the operator-requirements-to-roadmap workflow central to this role.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and make data-driven prioritization decisions with clear KPIs.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit robotics pilot — mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and sequencing execution to achieve zero operational downtime, demonstrating hardware/software integration rigor.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives for a robotics engineering team, triaging and closing **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain deployment velocity.

Partnered with IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable release cadence for mission-critical systems.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM workflow, improving conversion at every stage of the sales funnel.

Cut Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile to drive measurable top-of-funnel growth.
Identified and sealed margin leaks by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, delivering actionable pricing model improvements directly to leadership.
